en: Somethin' about the secrecy of us Let it hit, spin like reality
I can lose them to a fantasy It ain't heartbreak, but it still hurts enough
ko: 나는 그들을 환상 속으로 잃을 수 있어.

en: Oh baby, I'm crushed Crushed It won't ever be enough
ko: 오, 베이비, 나는 무너졌어. 절대 충분하지 않아.

en: Crushed Let's party, call it a crush Crushed
It won't ever be enough Crushed
ko: 누군가 구급차를 불러. 절대 충분하지 않아.

en: Crushed It's been a while Since I hit you back
Me and him, we had a chat And I think it's best I don't reply
Cause it has been a while But I can't let you go
And I should've let you know But I'm typin' it right now
Got me wonderin' if it's destiny Or am I just being messy
All I know is I'm lovin' the rush Then it hits me like reality
I can lose them to a fantasy It ain't heartbreak, but it still hurts enough
ko: 나는 그들을 환상 속으로 잃을 수 있어.
